name: Ilshin Spinning Co., Ltd
summary: Ilshin Spinning Co., Ltd produces and sells yarns and fabrics in South Korea. The company offers combed cotton, compact, slub, patched, tri-blended, blended and synthetic, and OE glove yarns under the THREESTAR brand; melange yarns under the MELANSTAR brand; and MVS yarns under the IVYSTAR brand. It also provides fabrics, including cotton, rayon, mixed, and interwoven fabrics, as well as offers dyed yarns and fabrics. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
